original: Several sleek black turrets are arrayed before you across the walkway, the roof of the installation, and even some hover-plats floating around the walkway’s side, tethered to the station. Any chance of stealth on this mission is long gone, now, as volleys of micro-rockets lock into barrels, ready to blast you to smithereens.
Somehow, the turrets’ swivelling moves them out of the way.
The armor plates soak up your attack.
You tuck and roll under the rocket, dodging the blast!

You jump back just in time as the rocket slams into the walkway, blowing you off your [pc.feet] and sending you rocketing back! You slam into some crates, breaking your fall (and nearly your back). Lucky you still have all your limbs!
